name: PID2Graph
annotation_shape: Symbols as graph nodes with bbox coordinates (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) and label; lines represent graph edges or symbol connections
cleaning_rule: Keep images with complete node bbox/label and edge graph annotations; convert symbols to equipment nodes, lines to edges, and preserve connection direction or undirected connectivity where direction is not annotated.
known_limitations: P&ID is an engineering proxy for PFD/process flow diagrams and may not contain reaction-route chemistry conditions.
license: CC BY-SA 4.0 for referenced PID sources noted in Zenodo record; verify exact archive terms before redistribution
warnings: Local dataset root not found; place files under data/raw/PID2Graph and rerun this audit.
next_actions: Download from Zenodo, checksum archives, inspect complete-plan graph files, then convert a 20-image sample into task5_graph_schema.json for validation.

name: PID_dataset
annotation_shape: P&ID images plus code/weights according to record; inspect archive for exact labels before model training
cleaning_rule: Keep equipment, valve, vessel, instrument, and pipeline samples after license/provenance review; downsample for light process diagram transfer.
known_limitations: Large archive and full P&ID complexity may overwhelm a lightweight optional task.
warnings: Local dataset root not found; place files under data/raw/PID_dataset and rerun this audit.
next_actions: Do not download by default; first reserve storage, download checksum-verified archive, then sample 50 drawings for symbol taxonomy mapping.

name: PIDCon
cleaning_rule: Keep all accessible images with box-line-connection-path annotations; convert directly to node-edge graph and evaluate GED/NCA.
known_limitations: More engineering-heavy than lightweight diagrams; download is via Baidu Disk and license is unclear.
license: No explicit repository license found as of audit; confirm before redistribution
warnings: Local dataset root not found; place files under data/raw/PIDCon and rerun this audit.
next_actions: Confirm access and license; normalize boxes, lines, connections, and paths into task5_graph_schema.json.

name: Dataset-P&ID / Digitize-PID
annotation_shape: Object detection style symbol labels; public mirrors often provide YOLO or imagefolder variants
cleaning_rule: Keep synthetic P&ID images with symbol boxes; map symbols to task equipment nodes and infer line/edge data only if annotation is present.
known_limitations: Often symbol-only, so node-edge graph recovery may require added line/connectivity annotation.
license: Original Google Drive terms need verification; derived Hugging Face mirrors vary
warnings: Local dataset root not found; place files under data/raw/Dataset-PID and rerun this audit.
next_actions: Prefer original Drive or a documented Hugging Face mirror; verify symbol class list and train/val split before ingestion.

name: RxnCaption / U-RxnDiagram-15k
annotation_shape: Reaction diagram images with detailed annotations for parsing reaction entities, arrows, conditions and topology structure
cleaning_rule: Keep samples with valid image paths and ground_truth annotations; map molecule/reagent/condition regions to nodes or parameters, reaction arrows to directed edges, and topology class to graph metadata.
known_limitations: Reaction-diagram focused rather than industrial PFD/P&ID; equipment nodes such as pump, valve, heat exchanger and vessel are not the main target.
license: Verify Hugging Face dataset card and upstream paper terms before redistribution
warnings: Local dataset root not found; place files under data/raw/U-RxnDiagram-15k and rerun this audit.
next_actions: Download through Hugging Face when storage and license review are ready; validate train/test image counts, annotation JSON schema and topology labels before conversion.

name: ReactionDataExtractor2
annotation_shape: Detected nodes and adjacency dictionary for reaction scheme entities; arrows, conditions, diagrams, labels
cleaning_rule: Use as a baseline and schema normalizer; keep only outputs generated from chemical reaction scheme images with valid node list and adjacency dictionary.
known_limitations: Still reaction scheme oriented; dependency and model-weight setup is heavier than a pure dataset.
warnings: Local dataset root not found; place files under data/raw/ReactionDataExtractor2 and rerun this audit.
next_actions: Install in isolated environment if needed; run on a small RxnScribe/own sample batch and normalize outputs to task5_graph_schema.json.

name: RxnScribe
annotation_shape: reactants, conditions, products with bounding boxes, OCR text, SMILES/molfile when recognized
cleaning_rule: Keep reaction diagrams with complete image and ground-truth split records; map reactants/products to nodes, reaction arrows to directed edges, and conditions text to parameters.
known_limitations: Not an industrial PFD/P&ID dataset; equipment such as pump, valve, vessel is mostly absent.
license: MIT for code repository; verify dataset/model terms on Hugging Face before redistribution
warnings: Local dataset root not found; place files under data/raw/RxnScribe and rerun this audit.
next_actions: Download images.zip only when storage permits; parse data/parse/splits into graph JSONL; audit OCR condition quality.

name: AI2D
annotation_shape: Object segmentations, diagrammatic elements, text elements, question-answer annotations
cleaning_rule: Keep only samples whose labels/text indicate chemistry, process, flow, reaction, heat, gas, liquid, apparatus, or arrow-rich scientific diagrams; otherwise use as generic pretraining only.
known_limitations: Not a chemical engineering dataset and lacks typical process equipment symbols.
license: Check AI2D terms before redistribution; dataset is hosted by AllenAI
warnings: Local dataset root not found; place files under data/raw/AI2D and rerun this audit.
next_actions: After download, keyword-filter annotations/text; sample 100 diagrams to estimate chemistry subset size before full conversion.
